task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Stripe Webhook Handler** (Level 7)

ARCHETYPE: webhook_handler. Shape: backend-only (no pages, no login/signup scaffold), one POST endpoint on a /webhook/* path, saves incoming payload to an Events table, returns { received: true }. DO NOT build auth, pages, or CRUD endpoints — this is a single-purpose receiver, not an app. Path: POST /webhook/stripe. Incoming body: { type, amount, customer_email, signature }. Check that a 'signature' field exists on the request (that
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Events table:
  event_type, required
  amount (number), default 0
  customer_email
  received_at_date, auto

when user sends event to /webhook/stripe:
  guard event's signature exists or 'Missing signature'
  new_event = { event_type is event's type, amount is event's amount, customer_email is event's customer_email }
  save new_event to Events
  send back { received: true }

test 'payment webhook succeeds':
  call POST /webhook/stripe with type is 'payment.succeeded', amount is 4500, customer_email is 'a@example.com', signature is 'sig_xyz'
  expect response status 200
  expect response body has 'received'

test 'invoice webhook succeeds':
  call POST /webhook/stripe with type is 'invoice.paid', amount is 1200, customer_email is 'b@example.com', signature is 'sig_abc'
  expect response status 200
